title: Source
description: A citable legal, regulatory, or institutional source backing a Clarvia workflow fact. Every publishable item must trace to at least one Source.

id.description: Unique source identifier. Format: src-{country}-{slug}, e.g. src-lu-guichet-succession.

url.description: Canonical URL where the source was accessed.

title.description: Human-readable title of the source document or page.

publisher.description: Organisation or entity that published the source.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. LU, FR, DE.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the source content, e.g. fr, de, en.

accessDate.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) the source was last accessed and verified.

publicationDate.description: Date the source was published or last updated by its publisher.

legalReference.description: Formal legal citation if the source is legislation or regulation.

archiveUrl.description: Wayback Machine or other archive URL for permanence.

notes.description: Free-text editorial notes about the source.

reviewEvents.description: Ordered audit trail of review actions on this source.

verificationStatus.description: Clarvia verification ladder. Objects progress upward; stale-review and superseded are decay states.
